zh.Bromley, Staffordshire, England: 英國斯塔福爾布羅姆利
zh.Abbots Bromley, Staffordshire, England: 英國斯塔福爾阿波茲 布羅姆利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Ranulph de Bromley II於1270年出生在英國爾巴丁頓時，他的父親Richard de Bromley19歲，母親Elizabeth de Knocton40歲。他與Agnes Dimsdale結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1330年在英國英格蘭爾巴丁頓享年60歲。

zh-hans.Bromley, Staffordshire, England: 英国斯塔福爾布羅姆利
zh-hans.Abbots Bromley, Staffordshire, England: 英国斯塔福爾阿波茲 布羅姆利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ranulph de Bromley II于1270年出生在英国爾巴丁頓时，他的父亲Richard de Bromley19岁，母亲Elizabeth de Knocton40岁。他与Agnes Dimsdale结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1330年在英国英格兰爾巴丁頓享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bromley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the many places called Bromley, in Essex, Hertfordshire, Kent (now in Greater London), Greater London, Greater Manchester, Staffordshire, Shropshire, and elsewhere. Most are named with Old English brōm ‘broom’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’, but Bromley (near Bow) in Greater London is from Old English bræmbel ‘bramble’ + lēah.

variants.name: Brimley
meanings: habitational name, perhaps from Brimley in Devon or Brimbley in Stoke Abbott, Dorset, both named with Old English brōm ‘broom’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

variants.name: Brumley
meanings: English (Lancashire): variant of   Bromley  . This surname is rare in Britain.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Ranulph de Bromley II was born in 1270, in Baddington, Cheshire, England, his father, Richard de Bromley, was 19 and his mother, Elizabeth de Knocton, was 40. He married Agnes Dimsdale. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1330, in Baddington, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ranulph de Bromley II est né en 1270, à Baddington, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Richard de Bromley, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth de Knocton, avait 40 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Dimsdale. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1330, à Baddington, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ranulph de Bromley II 1270 in Baddington, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard de Bromley 19 und seine Mutter Elizabeth de Knocton 40. Er hat Agnes Dimsdale geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1330 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Baddington, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ranulph de Bromley II è nato il nel 1270 nel Baddington, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Richard de Bromley, aveva 19 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth de Knocton, aveva 40 anni. Lui sposato Agnes Dimsdale. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1330, nel Baddington, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ranulph de Bromley IIが1270年にイギリスチェシュアイアバッドイントンで生まれた時，父Richard de Bromleyは19歳，母Elizabeth de Knoctonは40歳であった。Agnes Dimsdaleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1330年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアバッドイントンで60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ranulph de Bromley II(이)가 1270년 영국 체실르 바딩턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard de Bromley(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth de Knocton(은)는 40세였다. 그는 Agnes Dimsdale(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1330년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 바딩턴에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Baddington, Cheshire, England: Baddington, Legeceasterscir, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ranulph de Bromley II nasceu em 1270, em Baddington, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard de Bromley, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth de Knocton, tinha 40 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Dimsdale. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1330, em Baddington, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ranulph de Bromley II родился в 1270 г. в местности баддингтон, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard de Bromley было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de Knocton, 40. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Dimsdale. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1330 г. в местности баддингтон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ranulph de Bromley II nació en 1270, en Baddington, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard de Bromley, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Elizabeth de Knocton, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Agnes Dimsdale. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1330, en Baddington, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 60 años.
